title: viola obliqua var. crenulata
intro: Viola obliqua var. crenulata is a subspecies of the viola plant, also known as wild pansy, which is a type of flowering plant in the violet family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola obliqua var. crenulata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as an antioxidant to protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. Herbal preparations of Viola obliqua var. crenulata include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
